details.productUrlName: Dance of the Dead 1996 Leon Lindback ICE

customAttributes.description:
Take target creature from any graveyard and put it directly into play under your control, tapped, with +1/+1. Treat that creature as though it were just summoned. The creature does not untap during its controller’s untap phase. At the end of his or her upkeep, its controller may pay an additional 1B to untap it. If Dance of the Dead is removed, bury the creature in its owner’s graveyard.

Not a Tournament Legal card.
